seoTitle: How to Remap Due Dates and Reassign Tasks in ClickUp
metaDescription: Learn how to shift deadlines and switch task owners in bulk using ClickUp's toolbar, plus how templates can remap dates relative to a new start.
intro: When a project phase slips or team availability changes, manually updating dozens of individual due dates and assignees isn't practical. This guide covers ClickUp's bulk action toolbar for shifting dates and reassigning tasks across multiple items at once, plus the Remap Dates feature in templates that automatically scales subtask timelines relative to a new project start date.

steps.heading: Select multiple tasks
steps.body: Open your project list and hover over tasks to reveal checkboxes, then select the group of tasks you want to update together.

steps.heading: Open the Bulk Action Toolbar
steps.body: Checking multiple tasks triggers a toolbar across the top of the screen with options for editing several tasks at once.

steps.heading: Shift dates in bulk
steps.body: Click the Dates icon in the toolbar to apply, postpone, or shift start and due dates for all selected tasks simultaneously.

steps.heading: Reassign tasks to a different owner
steps.body: Click the Assignees icon next to it to instantly swap, add, or remove team members across the selected tasks.

steps.heading: Use Remap Dates in a template
steps.body: When applying a list template, activate the Remap Dates feature so ClickUp proportionally shifts every subtask's timeline based on a new project start or end date.

steps.heading: Verify the updated timeline
steps.body: Switch to Gantt or Table view to confirm the refreshed dates and assignee columns reflect your changes correctly.

faq.question: Can I skip weekends when remapping due dates?
faq.answer: Yes, there's a 'Skip Weekends' setting you can toggle so rescheduled dates stay mapped to business days rather than falling on a weekend.

faq.question: Does bulk reassigning notify the new owners?
faq.answer: New assignees are typically notified of their new task assignments, depending on your workspace's notification settings.

faq.question: Will remapping dates affect tasks with existing dependencies?
faq.answer: Yes, downstream dependent tasks can be rescheduled simultaneously when you shift a parent task's dates, depending on your dependency settings.

faq.question: Is bulk editing available on ClickUp's free plan?
faq.answer: Bulk action tools are available across ClickUp plans, though certain advanced automation features may be limited to paid tiers.
